problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: If Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
